column1:
They finally succeeded in escaping from the room. (managed)

They finally___________from the room.

I bought a new notebook on the way to school. (stopped)

On the way to school, I_____________a new notebook.

We're staying in Milan for a night before flying home. (planning)

We____________in Milan for a night before flying home.

I don't want to cook tonight - let's have a takeaway. (feel)

I don't__________tonight - let's have a takeaway.

I'm going to get annoyed if you don't stop making that noise! (continue)

If you______________that noise, I'm going to get annoyed!

Could you ask Francis to come into my office, please? (mind)

Do you____________Francis to come into my office, please?
